scripts.lint: uv run ruff check . --fix && uv run ruff format .
scripts.test: uv sync --group dev --group file-processing && uv run pytest
scripts.test:integration:run: RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 uv run pytest tests/integration/ -m integration
scripts.test:e2e: if rg -q '@pytest\.mark\.e2e' tests; then RUN_E2E_TESTS=1 uv run pytest -m e2e; else echo 'No CLI e2e tests collected; treating as pass'; fi
